comment: Hand-written cut map for the M0 spike. 12 angle switches over 10 minutes at 29.97 fps. Authority is the integer frame number — never float seconds. camera is 1-based (cam1=V1, cam2=V2, cam3=V3). Each entry means: from this frame (inclusive) until the next entry's frame, show this camera. Checkpoints marked for drift measurement: early / middle / late.
